title: Body recovered at Voëlklip Rd
description: GEORGE NEWS - Emergency services are on the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Emergency services are on the scene at Voëlklip road in Herold's Bay where a car has gone over the cliff.


> Rescue divers have recovered a body and are in the process of deciding how best to bring it back up to the road.


This is a developing story.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
